$comment: Correct import paths for common three addons and TSL, per renderer path. Keys are what you type; values are the resolved module. For bundler projects (Vite), import the specifier directly. For the no-bundler template, add the CDN entries from version-map.json.cdnImportmap to your <script type="importmap">.

webglOnly.$comment: EffectComposer + passes are the WebGLRenderer post-processing path. Do NOT use these with WebGPURenderer.

webgpuOnly.$comment: WebGPU uses core imports from 'three/webgpu' and node/TSL helpers from 'three/tsl'. Node post-processing comes from the webgpu bundle, not the addons/postprocessing folder.
webgpuOnly.tsl: import { Fn, uniform, vec3, texture, positionWorld, normalWorld, uv, mix, sin, time } from 'three/tsl'
webgpuOnly.passNodes: TSL pass()/mrt() helpers from 'three/tsl'; bloom via three/addons/tsl/display/BloomNode.js (import { bloom } from ...)

decoderHosting.$comment: Draco and KTX2 need external decoder binaries. Point the loaders at a hosted copy. jsDelivr paths shown; you can also copy node_modules/three/examples/jsm/libs/{draco,basis}/ into your public/ folder and host locally.
